description_long: This object appears to represent a police officer, but the form is highly distorted and abstract, with elongated and angular shapes that do not resemble a typical human figure. The structure is composed of sharp, irregular planes and stretched surfaces, primarily in shades of blue and black, with no discernible facial features, limbs, or standard uniform details. There are no visible hands, feet, or head, and the overall silhouette is fragmented and non-anthropomorphic. The surfaces are smooth and glossy, reflecting light in certain areas, and the object lacks any clear insignia, badge, or equipment typically associated with a police officer. The object does not display any recognizable clothing elements such as a shirt, pants, or tactical vest. The abstract nature and lack of detail make it difficult to identify any interactive parts or functional affordances.
description: An abstract, angular, and highly distorted representation of a police officer, primarily in blue and black with glossy surfaces and no recognizable human or uniform features.
description_view_0: Jagged, angular surfaces dominate the view, with stretched blue and black planes and no discernible human features.
description_view_1: A more open, triangular structure is visible, with elongated limbs and a glossy finish, but still no clear human or uniform details.
description_view_2: The object appears as a thin, stretched form with sharp angles and a mostly blue surface, lacking any recognizable police elements.
description_view_3: A vertical, fragmented structure with intersecting planes and a glossy blue-black finish, still lacking any human or uniform features.
attribute_uniform_type: No discernible uniform style; the figure is abstract and lacks visible clothing or standard police attire.
attribute_headgear_style: No headgear visible; the figure is abstract and lacks a defined head or hat.
